strategy: On Round 1 he strips all your pips and applies -100% power pip gain, so you build only 1 plain pip per round all fight. Plan a long, efficient game.
Do not try to overwrite his Power Play global, he re-casts it whenever it is changed. Work under it instead.
Use low-pip attacks, blades, and traps that fit a starved pip economy, and let a pet or wand hits help while pips are scarce.
Deal with the Emu Rider and Punk Wallaby minions with a cheap AoE as your pips allow.
Stack blades over several rounds and land your biggest affordable hit once you have saved enough plain pips.
cheatNotes: Round 1 he casts Power Play (-100% power pip gain) and Mana Burns away all your pips, you will gain only 1 plain pip per round all fight, so plan a slow, efficient build.
Overwriting his global just makes him recast it, leave it up and play around the pip starvation.
